label_notes: Source: training knowledge (WebFetch blocked 2026-03-20). Based on OpenAI's publicly available statements through Feb 2025. Notable: OpenAI allows opt-out of model training but implementation varies. Data usage for model improvement is a key concern. Payment data handling not exhaustively detailed in public policy. Verify current policy for latest updates on data retention and model training practices.
